title: Combat Companion
description: A persistent tactical HUD for D&D 5e – action economy, ability scores, skills, conditions, reactions list, spells with slots, weapon attacks, saving throws, features & abilities, and more. v1.6.3: Removed dead code (reactionItems, shortDesc, labels, isNPC); fixed unawaited settings save; fixed popout/sidebar state inconsistency; deduplicated menu button HTML; normalized variable naming and damage formatting; hardened spell attack detection for dnd5e v4.x key-based types.
